explanation: By enclosing the registry key path in double quotes, the command line no longer strictly ends with '\sam', bypassing the 'selection_cli_3' endswith condition.
Adding a trailing space to the end of the command line causes the 'endswith' condition in 'selection_cli_3' to fail, effectively bypassing the detection.
This bypasses the rule entirely by using the built-in 'reg.exe' utility rather than 'regedit.exe', completely evading the 'selection_img' condition.
